narrative.narrative: DXY weakness and elevated VIX signal risk aversion, mirroring the Luna crash in May '22, as BTC hovers near $60k amidst extreme Fear. Traders might consider hedging portfolios.
narrative.headline: Risk Off: Bitcoin Hangs Near $60K Amidst DXY Weakness and VIX Spike

consensus.key_reasoning: Both experts agree on the risk-off sentiment, with the Pattern Analyst signaling caution and the Narrative Writer emphasizing DXY weakness and VIX spike, indicating a high similarity to the May 2022 Luna crash scenario.
